name: Alien Core: Corrosion
description: Notes While not providing any stats by itself, this ring provides significant stat boosts when worn with other Alien Gear, reaching its full potential with an Alien Weapon and a Protection Matrix. Its effect is unpredictable, but can still help a lot if it triggers.
effects: No stat bonuses unless worn as part of set
On Taking Damage: 10% chance to throw poison. Impact Damage: 50 Total Damage: 1500 Duration: 4.5 seconds Cooldown: 10 seconds
